_comment: Memristor aLIF SNN — default configuration template

simulation._comment: dt_ms: integration timestep. 0.05ms is safe for tau_m~4ms.

regime._comment: Crossover frequency = 1000/tau_s_ms = 100 Hz. f > 100Hz = rate, f < 100Hz = temporal.

neuron_defaults._comment_topology: SERIES topology: Vm drives current through (Rm_S + Ra) voltage divider
neuron_defaults._comment_threshold: Vthresh_V = 4V. Hardware value from thyristor gate threshold.
neuron_defaults._comment_IF: I_min/I_max are MEASURED operating points on your device. Cm and t_ref are SOLVED.
neuron_defaults._comment_bias: I_0_uA: tonic bias. 0 = silent without input. >0 = shifts closer to threshold.
neuron_defaults._comment_synapse: tau_s1_ms = tau_s2_ms = Rs*Cs. Equal = alpha function (NMDA-like). tau_s1 < tau_s2 = AMPA.
neuron_defaults._comment_mode: network_mode: 'Is2' = alpha fn drives Vm (recurrent/NMDA). 'Is1' = exp drives Vm (feedforward/AMPA).
neuron_defaults._comment_weight: Default synaptic weights. Override per-connection in 'connections'.

populations._comment: Poisson input generators. rate_Hz can be changed dynamically with set_poisson_rate().
aLIF neurons. neuron_overrides overrides any neuron_defaults key for this population.

connections._comment: Every input neuron connects to every reservoir neuron.
Sparse recurrent excitation. p_connect=0.5 means ~50% chance of each pair connecting.
Sparse recurrent inhibition for E/I balance.

_comment_learning: See direction_task.json for a complete task with learning config.
